title: Dubai Decadence Family Holiday Package
short_description: 10 days / 9 nights of pure luxury across Dubai and Abu Dhabi: culture, Burj Khalifa, desert safari, theme parks, and family-friendly hotels.
description: Plan your perfect Dubai getaway with our exclusive holiday format. This flagship family package blends Dubai icons with an Abu Dhabi extension—Grand Mosque, palaces, and Yas Island theme parks—with private transfers and breakfasts throughout.
highlights: Private airport transfers
Family-friendly hotel with breakfast
Burj Khalifa observation deck and desert safari with BBQ
Dubai city highlights, dhow cruise (Creek or Marina)
Abu Dhabi full-day tour: Grand Mosque, palace and cultural stops
Choice of Yas Island theme park tickets
Optional upgrades: luxury yacht parties or private celebrations
inclusions: Sightseeing and activities as per itinerary overview
Desert safari with BBQ dinner and entertainment where listed
Dhow cruise dinner as per programme
Guided Abu Dhabi day(s) as outlined
exclusions: Meals not stated, personal expenses, tips
Theme park tickets unless confirmed in your final quote

Family-friendly hotel with breakfast
Dubai city tour, Dubai Mall & Aquarium

Burj Khalifa deck visit and desert safari with BBQ

title: UFC Fight Night Returns to Abu Dhabi
short_description: A polished Abu Dhabi event package combining UFC Fight Night access, a hotel stay, and breakfast for a short premium weekend.
description: This event-led package is built for guests who want a straightforward Abu Dhabi fight weekend without piecing the logistics together themselves. It combines UFC Fight Night access at Etihad Arena with a one-night hotel stay and breakfast, making it a cleaner high-intent package rather than a generic event listing.
highlights: UFC Fight Night access at Etihad Arena
One-night Abu Dhabi hotel stay
Breakfast included
Compact event-weekend format with simplified logistics

itinerary.title: Breakfast and Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast, check out, and depart with the event weekend wrapped up in one package.
